design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate horizontally scrolling space, destroy enemies, collect parts to transform spaceship into giant robot, then continue as transformed combat vessel
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Resource management of ship transformation state versus continuous enemy threat; balancing construction phases with combat necessity
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Piloting a modular combat spaceship that can reconfigure into a more powerful mechanical form mid-combat
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Unique transformation mechanic splits gameplay into two distinct phases: construction/navigation mode and combat-optimized robot mode. The game enforces a narrative progression through mechanical evolution rather than traditional level design.

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Player must decide when to complete transformation from ship to robot, balancing early combat capability against mobility constraints of partially-constructed form

progression.upgrade_system: Mandatory ship-to-robot transformation system; players progressively construct the robot through level progression rather than optional upgrades
progression.unlock_mechanism: Successful progression through horizontal scrolling segments unlocks transformation into more mobile robot form; gates progression on survival and enemy defeat
replayability_hooks: Master transformation timing for optimal combat efficiency

world_building_techniques: Mechanical enemy design suggests sci-fi setting
Enemy variety suggests faction or technological progression

boss_design.philosophy: Iconic mechanical creatures that test player mastery of current ship configuration; serve as phase gates requiring successful transformation
notable_bosses: Babylon - three-headed mechanical dragon boss (resembles Mecha-King Ghidorah from Godzilla franchise)

faction_indicators: Mechanical/robotic enemy design suggests technological civilization
Three-headed dragon imagery (Babylon reference) implies mythological or empire-scale antagonist
danger_signals: Continuous enemy waves during construction phases indicate active threat/invasion
Boss encounters signal major conflict points requiring transformation
environmental_storytelling: 3D scrolling field with obstacles suggests combat zone or hostile territory
Progressive enemy complexity parallels ship construction complexity

sources_used: wikipedia - MagMax article (gameplay section, boss character descriptions, game structure)
